name: palpitei
description: Palpitei v1 — jogo social de inteligência esportiva sobre a TxLINE. Trilha Consumer and Fan Experiences, Superteam World Cup Hackathon (TxODDS).

scripts.dev:prepare: npm run build:ds && npm run build:db
scripts.dev: npm run dev:prepare && npm run dev -w @palpitei/web
scripts.dev:https: npm run dev:prepare && npm run dev:https -w @palpitei/web
scripts.dev:local: npm run dev:prepare && npm run dev:local -w @palpitei/web
scripts.build: npm run build:ds && npm run build:db && npm run build -w @palpitei/web
